metadata.summary: Product specification (PRD) defines WHAT to build and WHY. Required sections: Overview, Problem, Goals, Non-Goals, User Stories, Functional Requirements, NFRs, Acceptance Criteria.

content.title: Product Specification Writing
content.summary: PRD defines WHAT to build and WHY. Every FR must have at least one AC; every goal must be measurable.

why.p: Specs mixing what and how box in engineers. Non-Goals prevent scope creep. Open Questions prevent false confidence.
